configuration.note: Multi-BWP (2x) with 50% static resource allocation - RSLAQ compliant. eMBB uses QCI=6 (NGBR_VIDEO_TCP_OPERATOR) mapped to BWP 0. mMTC uses QCI=80 (NGBR_LOW_LAT_EMBB) mapped to BWP 1.

drlControl.note: These are placeholder values - DRL integration not implemented yet

limitations: Physical isolation at BWP level with static QCI-to-BWP mapping
No dynamic resource allocation - static 50/50 split
No native DRL/xApp integration in this baseline
Metrics are from IP layer (FlowMonitor) - not MAC/PHY level
mMTC traffic uses DOWNLINK (remoteHost->UE) due to uplink NR issues in this nr-module version

technicalNotes.bwpMapping: eMBB: QCI=6 -> BWP0, mMTC: QCI=80 -> BWP1
technicalNotes.uplinkIssue: NR uplink traffic generation has issues with dedicated bearers - mMTC uses downlink as workaround
technicalNotes.drlReady: Control params exposed (embbResourceShare, mmtcResourceShare) for future xApp integration
